identity.name: AccuCloud Pro 2026
identity.tone: Clinical Premium, Industrial Precision, Apple-like Polish

primary.name: Vibrant Indigo
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Key Metrics

accent.name: Biohazard Rose
accent.usage: Alerts, Expiry Warnings, High Risk Status

success.name: Safety Emerald
success.usage: Stock Available, Production OK, Profit Positive

layout_strategy.container_style: The 'Device' Look: The main app wrapper should look like a high-end industrial tablet screen floating in space (padding around it, rounded-[50px] edges, deep shadow).
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Asymmetric). Never use equal-sized generic grids. Use 12-column logic: Hero (col-span-8), Stats (col-span-4), Lists (row-span-2).
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' between cards to mimic the clean environment of a lab.

overrides.style: No border in light mode, just shadow. Dark mode needs 1px border. Inner padding 'p-6' minimum.
Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary: Indigo gradient. Secondary: White with deep shadow.
Clean, row-hover effects, sticky header. Status badges must be 'pill' style.
Floating glass panel on the left, not attached to the edge. rounded-3xl.

dashboard.layout: Hero Chart (Revenue) + Top 5 Products List + KPI Cards.
dashboard.widgets: Real metrics. Don't use lorem ipsum for data. Box Mayor = Sales + Initial Base.

tpv_sales.layout: Left: Product Grid (Images + Price), Right: Cart/Checkout Panel.
tpv_sales.interaction: Fast add-to-cart. Search bar must be huge and focused.

inventory.layout: Data Table with 'Status' indicators. Expiring items (Date < Now + 30 days) must glow Red.

production.style: Each stage is a card. Active stage is highlighted Indigo. Completed is Green.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetric bento grids.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design using the provided palette and rounded-[50px] container strategy. Ensure the 'Production' module follows the 4-step visual workflow described. Use the image URLs for the Dashboard and Inventory mock data.
